features.description: Master feature key. Off = the whole module is invisible: no admin surfaces, no customer request path, no refund rendering on invoices.
Enables POST /api/v1/refunds/mine for customer-initiated refund requests. When off, only admin can initiate refunds. Tenants with high-touch support flows may prefer to disable customer self-service.
Enables refund_type='partial' + the refund_lines editor. Small tier is limited to refund_type='full'.
Enables refund_type='prorated' for cancelled memberships. Medium+ tier.
Permits cross-currency refunds when refund.currency != parent payment.currency. Medium+ tier.

Enables the require-approval flow (amount + staleness + reason-based thresholds). Off = every refund auto-approves. Default ON — SOX §404 audit trail requires human-in-the-loop for financial reversals above threshold.
Enterprise-only. Extends retention 7y -> 10y for financial audit alignment.
Enterprise-only. Unlocks bulk-refund CLI + admin bulk-issue UI for scenarios like class cancellation refunding 50+ athletes at once.

Enables the tenant.{id}.refunds broadcast channel + opt-in real-time refund notifications. Useful for tenants with high refund velocity who want live visibility into approval queues + provider dispatch.
Enables the /api/v1/reports/refund-volume endpoint. All tiers get the report; the feature key exists to allow admins to disable it independently for high-load tenants.
